productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Pink T-shirt
description: Style NoteTones of pink are loved by girls, especially in the summer. Try this dark pink, stylish and comfy T-shirt from united colors of benetton's latest collection. Getting you through the current fashion trend with aplomb, it's a perfect pick this season. Wear it with your favourite jeans and trendy footwear to cast a spell in this scorching heat.Product DetailsDark pink T-shirt with crystal embedded logo on the front, round neck and short sleevesMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash cool with like colours using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
